channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Elon Musk Reveals Details For SpaceX-Tesla Orbiting Data Center
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla CEO Elon Musk released specs for the orbital data centers his two companies are collaborating on. Tesla stock is soaring this week.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Rolls Out Unsupervised Robotaxis in ​Austin Metro Area, Reuters Reports
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the best NASDAQ stocks to buy and hold for 3 years. Reuters reported on June 3 that Tesla, Inc.

item.title: Rivian Launches the R2 to Chase Tesla
item.description: Customer deliveries for the R2 SUV begin Tuesday

item.title: Elon Musk Reacts To $30 Trillion SpaceX Valuation Call: 'Ron Is Smart'
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk hailed investor Ron Baron after the latter predicted that SpaceX could go on to become the most profitable and valuable company of all time ahead of its anticipated IPO. SpaceX To $30 Trillion?...

item.title: Tesla ‘FSD’ approved in Denmark, 4th European country in 2 months
item.description: Denmark has provisionally approved Tesla’s “Full Self-Driving” (Supervised) system, making it the fourth European country to clear the software in roughly eight weeks. The Danish Road Traffic Authority, Færdselsstyrelsen, confirmed the decision today — notably after Denmark had previously raised ...

item.title: Why Musk's SpaceX control is an 'all-out assault' on US market integrity
item.description: Yale School of Management executive fellow and "Picking Presidents" author, Gautam Mukunda, sits down with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman to explain how Elon Musk's 85% voting share at SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) poses a grave threat to US capital markets.

item.title: The Model 3 Era at Rivian Begins. Its Lower-Price EV Is Here.
item.description: Rivian Automotive has started its Model 3 era. Investors are hoping the company’s Tesla -like strategy leads to Tesla-like returns in the coming years. Rivian said in a social media post Tuesday that its next electric-vehicle model the R2 SUV, “is here.”

item.title: SpaceX IPO: A Tesla-Like Opportunity or a $1.75 Trillion Trap?
item.description: SpaceX nears an IPO at around $1.75T valuation, sparking a debate. Does it hold Tesla-like upside or are investors already paying for decades of success?

item.title: Elon Musk Reveals Insane Plan to Double American Chip Production in a Single Plant
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk is once again pitching a project that sounds engineered to break Excel spreadsheets. According to an X post from Sawyer Merritt circulating this week, Musk described Terafab as a roughly 100 million square foot facility, about 10 times larger than Tesla’s Giga Te...

item.title: Wall Street sees AI trade bearing fruit with MANGOS ahead of IPOs
item.description: MANGOS — no, not the tropical stone fruit — is the latest Big Tech acronym to be at the top of investors' minds ahead of 2026's biggest IPOs. MANGOS consists of Meta Platforms (META), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), Nvidia (NVDA), Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL), OpenAI (OPAI.PVT), and SpaceX (SPCX, SPAX.PVT). Yaho...

item.title: How Dutch Safety Data Could Open Europe for Tesla
item.description: Tesla stock rose early Tuesday, with investors digesting autonomous driving updates from the company and ARK Invest’s Cathie Wood. The modest early move came after Tesla released safety data on Dutch drivers using the company’s Full Self-Driving product, which can handle most driving tasks but s...

item.title: Tesla Just Lost One of Its Biggest Bears, but Is the Stock a Buy?
item.description: J.P. Morgan recently raised its price target on Tesla by more than 3x.

item.title: Waymo buys Apple’s abandoned self-driving car proving ground for $220M
item.description: Waymo has acquired a massive 5,500-acre autonomous vehicle proving ground in Wittmann, Arizona, for $220 million — nearly double the $125 million Apple paid for it in 2021. The facility was the centerpiece of Apple’s now-dead self-driving car program. The deal, recorded June 5 in Maricopa County ...

item.title: Tesla revises FSD transfer policy on new Cybertruck trim, causing cancellations
item.description: Tesla has apparently revised the policy it previously had listed for Full Self-Driving transfers on the newest All-Wheel-Drive Cybertruck that the company had sold for a steal price of just $59,000 earlier this year. After initially stating that customers who bought the pickup would be able to tr...

item.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, OpenAI Can Rewrite History for Megacap IPOs
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- The history of megacap initial public offerings shows that the stocks usually slump in the first year of trading. But upcoming listings from SpaceX, Anthropic and OpenAI are big enough and systemically important enough to the market that those analogies may not apply.Most Read from...

item.title: Potential implications from SpaceX IPO for Tesla?
item.description: Investing.com -- With SpaceX set to go public this week, Wolfe Research is examining what the listing could mean for Tesla investors, particularly as speculation around a potential merger between the two Elon Musk-led companies gains traction on Wall Street.

item.title: Rivian R2 First Drive: This is everything I need to upgrade my Model Y except…
item.description: Rivian flew us out to beautiful Park City, Utah, to get a first test of the R2, its $45,000 “bet-the-company” mass market SUV that it has promised for years. Today it begins delivering these vehicles, and I can say unequivocally after driving a performance variant for 5 hours, that these early cu...

item.title: Wall Street Pounds the Table: Tesla’s Future Is Not in Cars — It’s Robotics
item.description: The stock market has spent most of the past two years rewarding companies tied to artificial intelligence. Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) became the world’s most valuable business because it supplies the chips powering the AI revolution. Yet a growing number of investors are looking beyond AI software and ...

item.title: What is Elon Musk's net worth?
item.description: Elon Musk is the richest person in the world and close to becoming the first-ever trillionaire. How did the Tesla and SpaceX founder make his fortune?

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Here's What a $5,000 Investment Could Look Like in 5 Years
item.description: SpaceX is about to make history with a potential $75 billion IPO -- but before you rush to buy shares, you need to understand what's really driving this $1.8 trillion valuation.

item.title: Bye-Bye FAANG, Hello MANGOS: Will SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic IPOs Herald A New Wall Street Order?
item.description: MANGOS typically refers to artificial intelligence leaders such as Meta, Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX.

item.title: Why Is Tesla (TSLA) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) jumped 5.5% in the afternoon session after the company's unsupervised robotaxi service launched in Austin over the weekend, the most concrete step yet toward the autonomous revenue story the stock has been pricing in, while JPMorgan's upgrade...

item.title: Elon Musk Shows Detailed Design of AI Data Center Satellite
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Elon Musk unveiled a more detailed look at an initial version of an AI data center satellite SpaceX plans to build, providing fresh insight into the ambitious project driving the company’s highly anticipated initial public offering.Most Read from BloombergHouse Republican Says Hegs...

item.title: ASML Weighs Musk Terafab Talks Against Valuation And Governance Questions
item.description: Elon Musk joined ASML Holding’s (ENXTAM:ASML) recent technology conference virtually to discuss chip manufacturing ambitions tied to the proposed Terafab project. Musk and ASML executives held direct talks about supplying advanced lithography equipment for a planned Terafab chip fabrication facil...

item.title: TSLA Stock: Cathie Wood Slaps $75 Robotaxi Ticket Into ARK’s Bull Case
item.description: Cathie Wood experienced an unsupervised Tesla Robotaxi ride in Austin on Monday and immediately added a new cost line item to ARK Invest’s valuation model after the vehicle received a $75 parking ticket.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump, Iran Comments Spark Tech Rebound; Apple, Micron, Nvidia, Sandisk, Tesla Are Big Movers
item.description: Dow Jones Futures: President Trump and Iran's comments sparked a tech rebound Monday. Micron, Nvidia and Sandisk were big winners.

item.title: Your Tesla Is Twice As Likely To Hit 250,000 Miles As A Subaru: Study
item.description: Think electric cars don't last? Very few companies beat Tesla in this study of the longest lasting car brands.

item.title: Micron, Intel, Tesla, Apple, Lilly, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: The brutal AI selloff that rocked the market on Friday may end up being short-lived, judging by how chip makers are trading Monday.

item.title: SPACEX Heads To Nasdaq — But Steve Eisman Is ‘Not A Fan’ Of The IPO Or Potential Tesla Merger
item.description: Eisman on Monday expressed skepticism about SpaceX potentially merging with EV Giant Tesla Inc (TSLA), highlighting the latter company’s many challenges.

item.title: JPMorgan Just Dramatically Reversed Course on Tesla Because TSLA Stock Has Massive Physical AI Potential
item.description: A long-time Tesla bear just changed its tune, and the reason has almost nothing to do with cars.

item.title: Tesla tipped its hand at where Robotaxi is heading next
item.description: In the world of autonomous ride-hailing, there are only a handful of names. Among those few companies lies a strategy play by each to keep the opposition on their toes. Tesla, on the other hand, already tipped its hand at where it is headed next.

item.title: Tesla just did something in South Korea that no foreign carmaker has ever done
item.description: Tesla did something last month that no foreign car has ever done in South Korea by outselling every vehicle in the country, domestic or imported, finishing the month with Model Y as the single best-selling car across the entire Korean market. According to data from the Korea Automobile Importers ...

item.title: Tesla Model 3’s cheapest trim just got a major accolade
item.description: The Tesla Model 3’s cheapest trim level just got a major accolade, as Edmunds just revealed the Rear-Wheel-Drive trim of the all-electric sedan is the most efficient EV that is currently in production. The 2026 Tesla Model 3 Rear-Wheel-Drive not only beat its EPA-estimated range by 30 miles, but ...

item.title: Tesla: 190x P/E Ratio Reexamined
Bolt, Stellantis, Pony.ai to launch autonomous vehicle test program in Luxembourg
item.description: Estonian vehicle sharing platform Bolt will launch its first ‌autonomous mobility test program in ‌Luxembourg in collaboration with carmaker Stellantis and Chinese ​robotaxi operator Pony.ai, the companies said on Monday. The announcement followed a joint declaration of intent signed by 18 ‌Europ...

item.title: Baron Funds Got Boost From Updated Value of Their SpaceX Stock
item.description: The $17 billion Baron Partners fund and the $3.7 billion Baron Asset both got big gains last Thursday—almost 7% and 8%, respectively.

item.title: Will SpaceX Merge With Tesla? The Answer Might Be Hiding in Plain Sight.
item.description: SpaceX just filed an amendment to its IPO documentation, and one sentence suggests a major deal could be on the horizon.

item.title: Elon Musk: Coding Was a Top Job for Decades. It Will Be Dead By the End of the Year.
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has made yet another sweeping prediction about the future of work, this time aimed squarely at software engineers. Speaking at a recent conference, the Tesla chief argued that the entire practice of writing code in human-readable programming languages is about to...

item.title: At a $1.2 Trillion Market Cap, Is Tesla Stock Overvalued or Undervalued Right Now?
item.description: Tesla shares have historically been an unstoppable force, but it's now time for investors to assess the company's valuation.

item.title: With SpaceX IPO Imminent, This Strategy In Options Trading Bets On Rotation Out Of Tesla Stock
item.description: The largest IPO in history is days away, with SpaceX set to begin trading this Friday. While attention is fixed on the debut, investors may be overlooking a more actionable trade in Elon Musk's other public company, Tesla. Tesla's fundamentals have defied conventional logic since the company's in...

item.title: SpaceX IPO set to provide massive $11.6B windfall for teacher pension plan
item.description: The Ontario Teachers’ Pension Plan (OTPP) stands to reap one of the most extraordinary returns in pension fund history thanks to a bold 2019 investment in SpaceX. According to a recent report from The Globe and Mail , the Toronto-based fund invested roughly $300 million CAD (~$220 million USD at ...

item.title: Is the SpaceX IPO Crashing the Crypto Market?
item.description: The crypto market faces a hard question this morning. Can a single initial public offering, even one of historic scale, pull enough capital out of digital assets to bend their price action? Bitcoin (CRYPTO:BTC) is trading near $63,800, up 2.8% over the past 24 hours, yet the multi-week chart tell...

item.title: Tesla Stock Rises Ahead of SpaceX’s Friday IPO
item.description: Investors are waiting to see if some investors will sell Tesla stock to buy SpaceX shares. The two companies have grown close, collaborating on AI applications and semiconductor manufacturing. Any merger will be after the SpaceX IPO.

item.title: I Used Starlink—and It’s Absolutely Incredible
item.description: What SpaceX’s Starlink is worth is for each investor to decide. How it works is easier to say. It’s remarkable.

item.title: Tesla China Retail Sales Jump 22%. The Stock Is Bouncing.
item.description: Tesla retail sales in China grew 22% year-over-year in May, ending a two-month decline. Tesla stock rose modestly early Monday after diving last week.

item.title: SpaceX IPO: Should You Buy SPCX Stock?
item.description: The massive SpaceX IPO is almost here, with Elon Musk's space exploration and satellite company expected to start trading this Friday.

item.title: Tesla skeptics will hate what this new reliability study says
item.description: In a notable shift for electric vehicle perceptions, Tesla has emerged as a standout performer in the latest iSeeCars longevity study, which analyzed over 174 million used vehicles. The data reveals that Tesla models have a 4.6 percent chance of reaching 250,000 miles, matching the industry avera...

item.title: SpaceX is being 'rushed' into the public market, strategist says
item.description: Humilis Investment Strategies chief investment officer and CEO Brian Belski chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about why he won't be buying SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) when it goes public.

item.title: How Tesla’s Semi could reshape transform freight transport
item.description: Tesla is betting its Semi can transform freight transport with lower costs, longer range, and cleaner energy as diesel prices rise

item.title: Should You Buy SpaceX Stock This Week? Bull, Bear Arguments, and Red Herrings.
item.description: Depending on who investors read, the SpaceX IPO will either end Western civilization while ruining working-class retirement funds or usher in an AI-enabled global utopia, generating trillions in profits. For bullish investors, including Baron Capital and ARK Invest, the projected $1.8 trillion va...
